caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" and "EGO" printed in gold and white, and a gold watch sits in a recording studio. He wears large over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. He holds a smartphone in his left hand, looking down at the screen. Behind him are white banners featuring the text "UMIC HUSTLE" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black equipment case and a red and white circular logo that reads "TALK OUT". As the scene progresses, the man reacts to something on his phone, shifting from a neutral expression to a smile and a slight laugh, while remaining seated and continuing to hold the device.
